markdown:
**Source** [Divine Mysteries](/Sources.aspx?ID=234) pg. 257 **Traditions** [Arcane](/SpellLists.aspx?Tradition=1), [Occult](/SpellLists.aspx?Tradition=3), [Primal](/SpellLists.aspx?Tradition=4) **Deities** [Camazotz](/Deities.aspx?ID=334), [Nurgal](/Deities.aspx?ID=433), [Set](/Deities.aspx?ID=641) **Range** 30 feet **Target** 1 living creature **Defense** Fortitude **Duration** 1 day --- You curse the target with a thirst no drink can quench. You can [Dismiss](/Actions.aspx?ID=2311) the spell. The target must attempt a Fortitude save. **Critical Success** The creature is unaffected and is temporarily immune for 1 hour.
**Success** The creature is [fatigued](/Conditions.aspx?ID=73) for 1 round.
**Failure** The creature is immediately afflicted by thirst as if it hadn’t had a drink in days. It becomes fatigued and takes 1d4 damage each hour that can’t be healed until it quenches its thirst. No amount of drinking can quench the creature’s thirst during the spell’s duration.
**Critical Failure** As failure, but the creature takes 2d4 damage each hour. --- **Heightened (+3)** The thirst becomes more unbearable, increasing the damage each hour by 1d4, or by 2d4 on a critical failure.
name: Cup of Dust

markdown:
**Source** [Divine Mysteries](/Sources.aspx?ID=234) pg. 257 **Traditions** [Arcane](/SpellLists.aspx?Tradition=1), [Primal](/SpellLists.aspx?Tradition=4) **Deities** [Kabriri](/Deities.aspx?ID=432), [Magrim](/Deities.aspx?ID=450), [Sairazul](/Deities.aspx?ID=694) **Range** touch **Area** cube of dirt 5 feet across or smaller --- You remove loose dirt, dust, gravel, sand, and the like (though not solid stone) up to the size of a 5-foot cube. Any Medium or smaller creature standing atop the earth when the spell is cast must attempt a Reflex save or [Acrobatics](/Skills.aspx?ID=34) check. **Success** The creature is unaffected and can choose to either descend the pit without damage or move to the nearest available space of its choice.
**Failure** The creature falls [prone](/Conditions.aspx?ID=88) in the nearest available space of its choice or falls into the pit if it prefers.
**Critical Failure** The creature falls into the pit excavated by the spell and lands prone, taking falling damage as normal. --- **Heightened (+2)** The spell can excavate an additional 5-foot cube of earth. If you excavate all four 5-foot cubes beneath a Large creature, it must attempt a Reflex save or Acrobatics check, as above.
name: Expeditious Excavation

**Source** [Divine Mysteries](/Sources.aspx?ID=234) pg. 257 **Traditions** [Arcane](/SpellLists.aspx?Tradition=1), [Divine](/SpellLists.aspx?Tradition=2), [Occult](/SpellLists.aspx?Tradition=3), [Primal](/SpellLists.aspx?Tradition=4) **Range** 30 feet **Target** 1 creature **Defense** Fortitude --- You cause the creature’s vision to become particularly sensitive. The creature must attempt a Fortitude save. The creature is then temporarily immune for 1 minute. **Critical Success** The creature is unaffected
**Success** The creature is [dazzled](/Conditions.aspx?ID=65) for 1 round.
**Failure** The creature is dazzled for 1 minute.
**Critical Failure** The creature gains [light blindness](/MonsterAbilities.aspx?ID=68) for 1 minute. If the creature is already exposed to [bright light](/Rules.aspx?ID=2402), it immediately becomes [blinded](/Conditions.aspx?ID=59) until the end of its next turn, as it isn’t acclimated to its newly acquired light blindness. --- **Heightened (6th)** You can target up to 10 creatures.
name: Fear the Sun

**Source** [Divine Mysteries](/Sources.aspx?ID=234) pg. 257 **Traditions** [Arcane](/SpellLists.aspx?Tradition=1), [Occult](/SpellLists.aspx?Tradition=3), [Primal](/SpellLists.aspx?Tradition=4) **Deities** [Fumeiyoshi](/Deities.aspx?ID=305), [Pavnuri](/Deities.aspx?ID=420), [Thuskchoon](/Deities.aspx?ID=586), [Trelmarixian](/Deities.aspx?ID=393), [Xoveron](/Deities.aspx?ID=440) **Range** 30 feet **Target** 1 living creature **Defense** Fortitude **Duration** 1 week --- You curse the target with a hunger no food can sate. You can [Dismiss](/Actions.aspx?ID=2311) the spell. The target must attempt a Fortitude save. **Critical Success** The creature is unaffected and is temporarily immune for 1 hour.
**Success** The creature is [fatigued](/Conditions.aspx?ID=73) for 1 round.
**Failure** The creature is immediately afflicted by hunger as if it hadn’t eaten food in days. It becomes fatigued and takes 1d4 damage each day that can’t be healed until it sates its hunger. No amount of eating can sate the creature’s hunger during the spell’s duration.
**Critical Failure** As failure, but the creature takes 2d4 damage each day from unbearable hunger. --- **Heightened (+1)** The hunger becomes more intolerable, increasing the damage each day by 1d4, or by 2d4 on a critical failure.
name: Feast of Ashes

<title level="1" right="Spell 2" pfs="Standard">
[Fungal Hyphae](/Spells.aspx?ID=2352)
<actions string="Two Actions" />
</title>

<traits>
<trait label="Concentrate" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=32" />
<trait label="Fungus" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=77" />
<trait label="Manipulate" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=104" />
</traits>

<column gap="tiny">

**Source** [Divine Mysteries](/Sources.aspx?ID=234) pg. 257

**Tradition**
[Primal](/SpellLists.aspx?Tradition=4)

**Deity**
[Cyth-V’sug](/Deities.aspx?ID=428)

<row gap="medium">

 

</row>

<row gap="medium">

</row>

<row gap="medium">

**Duration** 1 minute
</row>

</column>

---

Thin hyphae grow from your feet and plunge into the earth, creating a symbiotic fungal network that attaches to plants within 30 feet and connects you to their root systems. You gain an [imprecise](/Rules.aspx?ID=2407) [tremorsense](/Rules.aspx?ID=2413), allowing you to sense anything directly touching plants within that distance. If you move, the hyphae snap, and the spell ends.

---
**Heightened (4th)** You can control plants in the area to a small degree, allowing you to make [Strikes](/Rules.aspx?ID=2895) with tree branches, exposed roots, or similarly solid plants. To do so, you use a Strike action, but you can Strike any creature you can detect with your tremorsense. These are spell attacks that deal 3d8 bludgeoning damage. Unusual plants, such as thorny vines, might deal a different type of damage at the GM’s discretion. You can’t make any other attacks through these plants, or take any other actions through them, other than these Strikes.

**Heightened (6th)** As 4th rank, but you can use other simple [manipulate](/Traits.aspx?ID=645) actions through the plants, including having a branch pick an object up or open a door, though more complex actions, such as picking a lock or [disabling a trap](/Actions.aspx?ID=2411), remain impossible.
name: Fungal Hyphae

<title level="1" right="Cantrip 1" pfs="Standard">
[Glamorize](/Spells.aspx?ID=2353)
<actions string="Two Actions" />
</title>

<traits>
<trait label="Cantrip" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=22" />
<trait label="Concentrate" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=32" />
<trait label="Manipulate" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=104" />
</traits>

<column gap="tiny">

**Source** [Divine Mysteries](/Sources.aspx?ID=234) pg. 258

**Traditions**
[Arcane](/SpellLists.aspx?Tradition=1), [Divine](/SpellLists.aspx?Tradition=2), [Occult](/SpellLists.aspx?Tradition=3), [Primal](/SpellLists.aspx?Tradition=4)

<row gap="medium">

 

</row>

<row gap="medium">

</row>

<row gap="medium">

**Duration** 1 hour
</row>

</column>

---

Using simple magical gestures, you alter a minor detail of your appearance (add or remove highlights to your hair color, apply or remove cosmetics, add polish or accessories to your nails, etc.) or create a small environmental effect that’s confined to your person (adjust surrounding lighting to favor your good side, cause a brief wind to make your hair blow dramatically, make a small chime occur as you smile, etc.). While the spell is active, you can [Sustain](/Actions.aspx?ID=2317) it to make further adjustments. The changes persist until the spell’s duration ends.

At the GM’s discretion, such alterations might grant a +1 status bonus to certain tasks, such as [Impersonate](/Actions.aspx?ID=2388) or [Perform](/Actions.aspx?ID=2401).
name: Glamorize

<actions string="Single Action" />

<traits>

<trait label="Concentrate" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=32" />

<column gap="tiny">

**Source** [Divine Mysteries](/Sources.aspx?ID=234) pg. 258

**Tradition**
[Occult](/SpellLists.aspx?Tradition=3)

**Deities**
[Nameless](/Deities.aspx?ID=598), [Ranginori](/Deities.aspx?ID=693), [Ristrentho](/Deities.aspx?ID=608), [Scal](/Deities.aspx?ID=410), [Shei](/Deities.aspx?ID=653), [Ssila’meshnik](/Deities.aspx?ID=548)

<row gap="medium">

 

</row>

<row gap="medium">
**Range** 60 feet

**Target** 1 creature
</row>

<row gap="medium">

</row>

</column>

---

You call out a liberating cry, urging an ally to break free of an effect that holds them in place. If the target is [grabbed](/Conditions.aspx?ID=77), [immobilized](/Conditions.aspx?ID=81), or [restrained](/Conditions.aspx?ID=90), it can immediately use a reaction to attempt to [Escape](/Actions.aspx?ID=2296).

<title level="1" right="Spell 1" pfs="Standard">
[Malediction](/Spells.aspx?ID=2355)
<actions string="Two Actions" />
</title>

<traits>
<trait label="Aura" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=206" />
<trait label="Concentrate" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=32" />
<trait label="Manipulate" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=104" />
<trait label="Mental" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=106" />
</traits>

<column gap="tiny">

**Source** [Divine Mysteries](/Sources.aspx?ID=234) pg. 258

**Tradition**
[Divine](/SpellLists.aspx?Tradition=2)

<row gap="medium">

 

</row>

<row gap="medium">

**Area** 10-foot [emanation](/Rules.aspx?ID=2387)

</row>

<row gap="medium">
**Defense**
Will

**Duration** 1 minute
</row>

</column>

---

You incite distress in the minds of your enemies, making it more difficult for them to defend themselves. Enemies in the area must succeed at a Will save or take a –1 status penalty to AC as long as they’re in the area. Once per round on subsequent turns, you can [Sustain](/Actions.aspx?ID=2317) the spell to increase the emanation’s radius by 10 feet and force enemies in the area that weren’t yet affected to attempt a saving throw. Malediction can counteract [_benediction_](/Spells.aspx?ID=2345).
name: Malediction

<title level="1" right="Spell 1" pfs="Standard">
[Message Rune](/Spells.aspx?ID=2356)
<actions string="" />
</title>

<traits>
<trait label="Concentrate" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=32" />
<trait label="Linguistic" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=101" />
<trait label="Manipulate" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=104" />
<trait label="Mental" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=106" />
</traits>

<column gap="tiny">

**Source** [Divine Mysteries](/Sources.aspx?ID=234) pg. 258

**Traditions**
[Arcane](/SpellLists.aspx?Tradition=1), [Occult](/SpellLists.aspx?Tradition=3)

**Deities**
[Cormigus](/Deities.aspx?ID=669), [Lissala](/Deities.aspx?ID=565), [Mephistopheles](/Deities.aspx?ID=400), [Nyarlathotep (The Crawling Chaos)](/Deities.aspx?ID=573), [Nyarlathotep (The Veiled Voice)](/Deities.aspx?ID=575), [Pavnuri](/Deities.aspx?ID=420), [Pillars of Knowledge](/Deities.aspx?ID=209), [Thoth](/Deities.aspx?ID=524), [Ydajisk](/Deities.aspx?ID=554)

<row gap="medium">

**Cast** 5 minutes

 

</row>

<row gap="medium">
**Range** touch

**Target** 1 flat unattended surface or a non-magical object of light Bulk
</row>

<row gap="medium">

**Duration** 1 day
</row>

</column>

---

You record a message up to 5 minutes long and inscribe a special rune on any flat unattended surface or small object within reach. The nature of the rune’s appearance is up to you, but it’s visible to everyone, and it must be no smaller than 2 inches in diameter. You also specify a trigger that creatures must meet to [ activate the rune](/Rules.aspx?ID=2252). For the duration of the spell, creatures that meet the criteria of the trigger can touch the rune to hear the recorded message in their head as though you were speaking to them telepathically. You know when someone is listening to the message, but you don’t know who’s listening to it. You can [Dismiss](/Actions.aspx?ID=2311) the spell.

---
**Heightened (+2)** The duration increases for every 2 ranks, becoming 1 week, 1 month, 1 year, or unlimited respectively.
name: Message Rune

**Source** [Divine Mysteries](/Sources.aspx?ID=234) pg. 258 **Traditions** [Divine](/SpellLists.aspx?Tradition=2), [Primal](/SpellLists.aspx?Tradition=4) **Range** 500 feet **Area** 60-foot [burst](/Rules.aspx?ID=2385) **Defense** Reflex --- A powerful globe of chilling moonlight explodes in the area, dealing 8d10 [cold](/Traits.aspx?ID=555) damage to all creatures in the area, plus an additional 8d10 [vitality](/Traits.aspx?ID=509) damage to [undead](/Traits.aspx?ID=722) creatures. Moonburst’s cold damage is [silver](/Equipment.aspx?ID=2920) damage for the purposes of [weaknesses, resistances, and the like](/Rules.aspx?ID=2312). Each creature and object in the area must attempt a Reflex save. **Critical Success** The creature is unaffected.
**Success** The creature takes half damage.
**Failure** The creature takes full damage.
**Critical Failure** The creature takes full damage and becomes [blinded](/Conditions.aspx?ID=59) permanently. If the globe overlaps with an area of magical [darkness](/Rules.aspx?ID=2404), _moonburst_ attempts to [counteract](/Rules.aspx?ID=2250) the darkness effect. --- **Heightened (+1)** The [cold](/Traits.aspx?ID=555) damage increases by 1d10, and the [vitality](/Traits.aspx?ID=509) damage against [undead](/Traits.aspx?ID=722) increases by 1d10.
name: Moonburst

**Source** [Divine Mysteries](/Sources.aspx?ID=234) pg. 258 **Traditions** [Divine](/SpellLists.aspx?Tradition=2), [Primal](/SpellLists.aspx?Tradition=4) **Range** 120 feet **Target** 1 creature **Defense** AC --- You unleash a holy beam of freezing moonlight. Make a [ranged spell attack](/Rules.aspx?ID=2248). The ray deals 5d6 [cold](/Traits.aspx?ID=555) damage. If the target has the [unholy](/Traits.aspx?ID=521) trait, you deal an extra 5d6 [spirit](/Traits.aspx?ID=737) damage. Moonlight ray’s cold damage is [silver](/Equipment.aspx?ID=2920) damage for the purposes of [weaknesses, resistances, and the like.](/Rules.aspx?ID=2312) **Critical Success** The target takes double damage.
**Success** The target takes full damage. If the light passes through an area of magical [darkness](/Rules.aspx?ID=2404) or targets a creature affected by magical darkness, _moonlight ray_ attempts to [counteract](/Rules.aspx?ID=3280) the darkness. If you need to determine whether the light passes through an area of darkness, draw a line between yourself and the spell’s target. --- **Heightened (+1)** The cold damage increases by 2d6, and the spirit damage against unholy creatures increases by 2d6.
name: Moonlight Ray

markdown:
<title level="1" right="Spell 2" pfs="Standard">
[Penumbral Disguise](/Spells.aspx?ID=2359)
<actions string="Two Actions" />
</title>

<traits>
<trait label="Concentrate" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=32" />
<trait label="Darkness" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=39" />
<trait label="Manipulate" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=104" />
<trait label="Shadow" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=143" />
</traits>

<column gap="tiny">

**Source** [Divine Mysteries](/Sources.aspx?ID=234) pg. 258

**Traditions**
[Arcane](/SpellLists.aspx?Tradition=1), [Occult](/SpellLists.aspx?Tradition=3)

**Deity**
[Dajermube](/Deities.aspx?ID=338)

<row gap="medium">

 

</row>

<row gap="medium">
**Range** touch

**Target** 1 willing creature
</row>

<row gap="medium">

**Duration** 10 minutes
</row>

</column>

---

You wrap the target in shadows, granting it a +1 status bonus to [Stealth](/Skills.aspx?ID=48) checks to [Hide](/Actions.aspx?ID=2404) while in [dim light](/Rules.aspx?ID=2403) or [darkness](/Rules.aspx?ID=2404). In addition, the shadows mask the target’s features. While the target is in dim light or darkness, other creatures must succeed at a [Seek](/Actions.aspx?ID=2301) action against the spell’s DC to discern details about its appearance. For example, without using Seek, other creatures can determine the target’s general shape (such as [humanoid](/Traits.aspx?ID=628)), but they must Seek to determine the target’s precise appearance. Creatures with [darkvision](/Rules.aspx?ID=2410) can still see the target and its features normally. The target’s normal appearance is revealed in [bright light](/Rules.aspx?ID=2402).

---
**Heightened (4th)** The status bonus is +2. Creatures with darkvision can no longer discern details about the target while the target is in dim light or darkness without Seeking, though creatures with greater darkvision can still determine these details. 

**Heightened (6th)** As 4th rank, except the status bonus is +3, and creatures without darkvision can’t determine even general details about the target while the target is in dim light or darkness unless they successfully Seek the target; these creatures see a vague shadow instead. Even on a successful Seek, they only determine general features, though they can see details on a critical success.

**Heightened (8th)** As 6th rank, except the status bonus is +4, and even creatures with greater darkvision must Seek to discern details about the target while the target is in dim light or darkness.
name: Penumbral Disguise

markdown:
**Source** [Divine Mysteries](/Sources.aspx?ID=234) pg. 259 **Traditions** [Arcane](/SpellLists.aspx?Tradition=1), [Occult](/SpellLists.aspx?Tradition=3) **Deities** [Aleth](/Deities.aspx?ID=328), [Black Butterfly](/Deities.aspx?ID=468), [Cosmic Caravan](/Deities.aspx?ID=377), [Count Ranalc](/Deities.aspx?ID=452), [Kerkamoth](/Deities.aspx?ID=140), [Nocticula](/Deities.aspx?ID=724), [Set](/Deities.aspx?ID=641), [Shawnari](/Deities.aspx?ID=600), [Thamir](/Deities.aspx?ID=566), [The Lady of the North Star](/Deities.aspx?ID=303) **Range** 30 feet **Target** 1 creature **Defense** Reflex **Duration** 10 minutes --- You envelop the target in a shroud of shadow. The target perceives [light](/Rules.aspx?ID=2401) as one step lower than it actually is ([bright light](/Rules.aspx?ID=2402) becomes [dim light](/Rules.aspx?ID=2403), for example), affecting their ability to sense creatures and objects accordingly. The shroud also provides the target a +1 status bonus to saving throws against [light](/Traits.aspx?ID=640) effects. This effect is helpful to creatures sensitive to light, and a creature can willingly choose to be subject to the failure effect of the spell. **Critical Success** The target is unaffected.
**Success** The effect lasts for 1 round.
**Failure** The effect lasts its normal duration.
name: Penumbral Shroud

<title level="1" right="Spell 2" pfs="Standard">
[Radiant Field](/Spells.aspx?ID=2361)
<actions string="Three Actions" />
</title>

<traits>
<trait label="Concentrate" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=32" />
<trait label="Light" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=100" />
<trait label="Manipulate" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=104" />
</traits>

<column gap="tiny">

**Source** [Divine Mysteries](/Sources.aspx?ID=234) pg. 259

**Traditions**
[Arcane](/SpellLists.aspx?Tradition=1), [Divine](/SpellLists.aspx?Tradition=2), [Occult](/SpellLists.aspx?Tradition=3), [Primal](/SpellLists.aspx?Tradition=4)

<row gap="medium">

 

</row>

<row gap="medium">
**Range** 120 feet

**Area** 20-foot [burst](/Rules.aspx?ID=2385)

</row>

<row gap="medium">
**Defense**
Fortitude

**Duration** 1 minute
</row>

</column>

---

You create an area of [bright light](/Rules.aspx?ID=2402). Creatures with [light blindness](/MonsterAbilities.aspx?ID=68) that are [blinded](/Conditions.aspx?ID=59) by radiant field and remain in the area must attempt a Fortitude save at the start of their turns. On a failure, a creature remains blinded for 1 round; this is an [incapacitation](/Traits.aspx?ID=631) effect. This spell also suppresses magical [darkness](/Rules.aspx?ID=2404) of your radiant field spell’s rank or lower.

---
**Heightened (4th)** Creatures seen through the area are [concealed](/Conditions.aspx?ID=62) to creatures outside the area. Creatures with light blindness can continue to be blinded by the field as long as the field is visible, even when outside of the field.
name: Radiant Field

markdown:
<title level="1" right="Spell 4" pfs="Standard">
[Reflective Scales](/Spells.aspx?ID=2362)
<actions string="Two Actions" />
</title>

<traits>
<trait label="Concentrate" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=32" />
<trait label="Manipulate" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=104" />
</traits>

<column gap="tiny">

**Source** [Divine Mysteries](/Sources.aspx?ID=234) pg. 259

**Traditions**
[Arcane](/SpellLists.aspx?Tradition=1), [Primal](/SpellLists.aspx?Tradition=4)

**Deities**
[Abraxas](/Deities.aspx?ID=425), [Anogetz](/Deities.aspx?ID=416), [Irez](/Deities.aspx?ID=472), [Nalinivati](/Deities.aspx?ID=313), [Shizuru](/Deities.aspx?ID=315), [Wadjet](/Deities.aspx?ID=643)

<row gap="medium">

 

</row>

<row gap="medium">

</row>

<row gap="medium">

**Duration** 1 minute
</row>

</column>

---

You grow a set of colored, glowing scales or scaled armor that stores energy before releasing it in a final burst. When you cast this spell, choose [acid](/Traits.aspx?ID=524), [cold](/Traits.aspx?ID=555), [fire](/Traits.aspx?ID=604), [electricity](/Traits.aspx?ID=586), or [poison](/Traits.aspx?ID=669) damage. You gain [resistance](/Rules.aspx?ID=2312) 5 against that type of damage. The scales’ color depends on the damage type you chose, such as red or orange for fire damage.

The scales store up energy as they protect you. Keep track of how much damage the scales have prevented. As a 2-action activity that has the [concentrate](/Traits.aspx?ID=561) and [manipulate](/Traits.aspx?ID=645) traits, you can explode your scales outward in a 20-foot emanation, dealing 1d6 damage of the chosen type to all creatures in the area for every 10 damage the scales have prevented, to a maximum of 10d6 damage (after preventing 100 damage). Each creature in the area must attempt a [basic](/Rules.aspx?ID=2247) Reflex save. Once you do so, the spell ends.

---
**Heightened (+2)** The resistance increases by 5, and the maximum damage from the scale explosion increases by 5d6.
name: Reflective Scales

<title level="1" right="Spell 1" pfs="Standard">
[Share Lore](/Spells.aspx?ID=2363)
<actions string="" />
</title>

<traits>
<trait label="Concentrate" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=32" />
<trait label="Manipulate" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=104" />
<trait label="Mental" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=106" />
</traits>

<column gap="tiny">

**Source** [Divine Mysteries](/Sources.aspx?ID=234) pg. 259

**Traditions**
[Arcane](/SpellLists.aspx?Tradition=1), [Occult](/SpellLists.aspx?Tradition=3)

**Deities**
[Abraxas](/Deities.aspx?ID=425), [Gruhastha](/Deities.aspx?ID=346), [Matravash](/Deities.aspx?ID=617), [Mazludeh](/Deities.aspx?ID=680), [Nin](/Deities.aspx?ID=353), [Saloc](/Deities.aspx?ID=547), [The Endless Road](/Deities.aspx?ID=246), [The Enlightened Scholar's Path](/Deities.aspx?ID=251), [Vale](/Deities.aspx?ID=551), [Winlas](/Deities.aspx?ID=656), [Zohls](/Deities.aspx?ID=489)

**Patron Theme**
[Choir Politic](/Patrons.aspx?ID=24)

<row gap="medium">

**Cast** 1 minute

 

</row>

<row gap="medium">
**Range** touch

**Target** up to 3 creatures
</row>

<row gap="medium">

**Duration** 10 minutes
</row>

</column>

---

You share your knowledge with the touched creatures. Choose one [Lore](/Skills.aspx?ID=41) skill in which you’re trained. The targets become trained in that Lore skill for the duration of the spell.

---
**Heightened (3rd)** The duration of the spell is 1 hour, and you can target up to five creatures.

**Heightened (5th)** The duration of the spell is 8 hours, you can target up to five creatures, and you can share up to two Lore skills in which you’re trained.
name: Share Lore

<title level="1" right="Spell 1" pfs="Standard">
[Shattering Gem](/Spells.aspx?ID=2364)
<actions string="Two Actions" />
</title>

<traits>
<trait label="Concentrate" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=32" />
<trait label="Earth" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=55" />
<trait label="Manipulate" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=104" />
</traits>

<column gap="tiny">

**Source** [Divine Mysteries](/Sources.aspx?ID=234) pg. 259

**Traditions**
[Arcane](/SpellLists.aspx?Tradition=1), [Primal](/SpellLists.aspx?Tradition=4)

**Deities**
[Ashukharma](/Deities.aspx?ID=611), [Mammon](/Deities.aspx?ID=399), [Sairazul](/Deities.aspx?ID=694), [The Resplendent Court](/Deities.aspx?ID=272), [Yuelral](/Deities.aspx?ID=463)

<row gap="medium">

 

</row>

<row gap="medium">
**Range** touch

**Target** 1 creature
</row>

<row gap="medium">

**Duration** 1 minute
</row>

</column>

---

A large gem floats around the target in an erratic pattern. The gem has 5 Hit Points. Each time a creature [Strikes](/Rules.aspx?ID=2895) the target, the target attempts a DC 11 flat check. On a success, the gem blocks the attack, so the attack first damages the gem and then applies any remaining damage to the target. If the gem is reduced to 0 Hit Points, it shatters, immediately dealing 1d8 slashing damage (basic Reflex save) to the creature that destroyed it, as long as that creature is within 10 feet of the target.

---
**Heightened (+1)** The gem has 5 additional Hit Points, and the damage dealt by its detonation increases by 1d8.
name: Shattering Gem
